privileged_info_for_vlm: The project is located at /home/ga/IdeaProjects/ecommerce-legacy. The crash log is at /home/ga/Desktop/crash_log.txt. The bug is a java.lang.NullPointerException in src/main/java/com/ecommerce/core/OrderProcessingService.java within the 'calculateTax' method. The root cause is calling getCity() on a null billing address (order.getCustomer().getBillingAddress() returns null). A correct fix must prevent this NPE, typically by adding a null check before calling getCity().
